reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify who succeeded David Stern as commissioner of the NBA after his retirement.
2. Use that person to determine the American lawyer and businessman who is the current commissioner.
original_final_question: After David Stern retired from being commissioner of the NBA, this american lawyer and businessman succeed him and is now the current commissioner who is he? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who succeeded David Stern as commissioner of the NBA? Evidence: Commissioner of the NBA: The current commissioner is Adam Silver after he succeeded David Stern on February 1, 2014. -> Adam Silver

Node 2: Which American lawyer and businessman is currently commissioner of the NBA? Evidence: Adam Silver: Adam Silver (born April 25, 1962) is an American lawyer and businessman, who is currently the commissioner of the National Basketball Association (NBA). -> Adam Silver
